verdict.answer_first: A: "use a managed auth provider, don't roll your own" is the cleanest first-line answer; B also starts with "Use a managed provider".
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to the core decision: "Use a provider"; B ends with "Clerk or Supabase" and asks to narrow later, so it splits the call.
verdict.fabrication: B invents the strongest unsupported number: "production in a day"; A also has unsupported pricing claims but fewer hard numbers.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to save: "Check the lock-in / export story" plus stack/customer mapping gives a concrete avoidance rule.
